game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
An idle game about making cookies! Originally released in 2013 on the web, and actively developed since then. This is the official version for Steam. Cookie Clicker is a game about making an absurd amount of cookies. To help you in this endeavor, you will recruit a wide variety of helpful cookie makers, like friendly Grandmas, Farms, Factories, and otherworldly Portals.

Cookie Clicker was originally released in 2013, but has been very actively developed since then. If you played it before, try it again to see all the new features!

  • Collect cookies and spend them to earn even more cookies
  • Over 600+ upgrades
  • Over 500+ Achievements
  • Pet your dragon
  • Mini-games
  • Unlock heavenly perma-upgrades
  • Cloud saving (no more deleting cookies by accident)
  • Music by C418
  • Play community-made mods through Steam workshop
game_info.description: Welcome to Cookie Clicker! Your goal is to bake as many cookies as possible. Click the giant cookie to earn cookies manually, then spend your cookies to purchase buildings that automatically generate cookies for you. Each building type produces cookies at different rates. Unlock upgrades to boost your production and reach higher cookie counts. Can you reach 10,000 cookies to achieve ultimate victory?
game_info.controls:
SPACE: Click the cookie to earn 1 cookie
Arrow UP: Scroll upgrades/buildings menu up
Arrow DOWN: Scroll upgrades/buildings menu down
Z: Purchase selected building/upgrade
SHIFT: Toggle between Buildings and Upgrades tabs
ENTER: Start game (from start screen)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (returns to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic cookie clicking mechanics. Verify that manual clicking works and cookies are earned correctly. Test that the cookie click animation triggers properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Repeatedly press SPACE to click the cookie. Track cookie count increases. Verify each click adds exactly 1 cookie to the total.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Cookie count increases by 1 for each SPACE press. Visual feedback shows on cookie. No errors occur during repeated clicking. Game state correctly tracks manual clicks.

TEST_1.expected: Cookie count increases by 1 for each SPACE press. Visual feedback shows on cookie. No errors occur during repeated clicking. Game state correctly tracks manual clicks.

TEST_2.test_description: Test winning condition by purchasing buildings efficiently. Validate that buildings generate cookies automatically and the win condition triggers at 10,000 cookies.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Click cookie manually to earn initial cookies. Purchase Cursor first (cheapest), then Grandma, then Farm. Balance manual clicking with waiting for passive generation. Continue until reaching 10,000 cookies.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully reach 10,000 cookies. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Win screen displays with final statistics. Buildings generate cookies passively as expected.

TEST_2.expected: Successfully reach 10,000 cookies. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Win screen displays with final statistics. Buildings generate cookies passively as expected.

TEST_3.test_description: Test upgrade system functionality. Verify upgrades can be purchased and correctly boost production rates of buildings.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Earn cookies and purchase buildings. Switch to Upgrades tab using SHIFT. Purchase available upgrades. Verify production rate increases after upgrade purchase.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Upgrades become available after building requirements met. Purchasing upgrades increases cookies per second. Upgrade costs are deducted correctly. Production boosts apply immediately.

TEST_4.test_description: Test menu navigation and building purchase mechanics. Verify scrolling through buildings, selection, and purchase validation works correctly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Use Arrow UP/DOWN to navigate through building list. Attempt to purchase buildings when affordable and when not affordable. Verify proper feedback and state updates.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Menu scrolls correctly through all buildings. Cannot purchase when insufficient cookies. Successful purchases deduct correct cost and add building. Building count updates correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Test random cookie spawning and collection mechanics. Verify golden cookies appear, can be collected, and provide correct bonuses.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Play game and watch for golden cookie spawns. When visible, click the cookie area. Verify bonus is applied. Track cookie gains from golden cookies.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Golden cookies spawn randomly during gameplay. Clicking near them collects them. Bonus cookies are awarded (10-50). Visual feedback shows collection. Cookies fade after timeout.
